case_title: SOULIS, TED vs. PIERCE, JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PIERCE, JAMES PIERCE, LOIS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT PIERCE, JAMES PIERCE, LOIS

DEPT. 2, RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, JUDGE; BELDON YEE, CSR; V. T. INVENTADO, CLERK. 2:15 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF & AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: 1. FOR POSSESSION & RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES AT 621 WEBSTER ST, SF; 2. WAIVES SHARE OF RENT & PER DIEM DAMAGES; 3. NO JUDGMENT UNLESS DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE ON 6/3/97; 4. IF DEFENDANT VACATES ON 6/3/97, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE; 5. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE ON 6/3/97, PLTFF WILL APPLY EXPARTE APPLN W/ 24 HOURS NOTICE FOR JUDGMENT; 6. NO FURTHER STAYS; 7. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS; 8. PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT $766.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT IF HE VACATES PREMISES; 9. PLAINTIFF IS ALLOWED TO INSPECT PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 6/3/97; 10. LEASE IS FORFEITED. STIPULATION TO BE REDUCED IN WRITING.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOULIS, TED AS TO DEFENDANT PIERCE, JAMES PIERCE, LOIS DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED
